visual: Stands on the right leg with left toe touching, right hand raised above the forehead and left hand settled by the hip, body upright like a crane.
motion_description: The motion begins with a slow, continuous shift of weight entirely onto the right leg as the torso rotates nearly 90 degrees to the right. The right arm sweeps downward and arcs high above the forehead with the palm facing outward, while the left hand descends to settle by the left hip, palm down. Concurrently, the left knee elevates high before the leg steadily lowers, ending with the left toe touching the ground slightly forward. The movement finalizes with a deliberate pause, maintaining an upright posture.
